postText:
Cataracts — What You Need to Know 👁️

Cataracts are the most common surgical condition in ophthalmology. It's a clouding of the eye's natural lens, causing blurred vision, glare, and difficulty reading.

Did you know?
✅ Cataract surgery is one of the most commonly performed surgeries in the world
✅ Traditional cataract surgery with a standard lens may be fully covered by insurance
✅ Laser-assisted surgery and premium lenses are also available
✅ Recovery is relatively quick — many return to normal activities within days

At Dr. Adam Black's clinic, you can receive professional and thorough consultation.
To schedule: (212) 555-0199
